description:
Design description: Full-width printing, single-sided printing.
Material description: Made of premium anti-pilling flannel, softer, more comfortable, and warmer.
Product performance:
1: Soft and comfortable – This flannel blanket is crafted from high-quality flannel fabric with a smooth and delicate touch.
2: Excellent thermal insulation – Flannel offers great heat retention and effectively blocks cold air.
3: Durable and long-lasting – Made with anti-pilling technology, this flannel blanket is durable and not easy to wear, fade, or shed.
Size Options:
• 30 × 40 inch — Perfect for babies, toddlers, pets, stroller blanket, or small lap blanket.
• 40 × 50 inch — Great as a small throw blanket for sofa, office nap, kids, or travel.
• 51 × 60 inch — Classic throw size, suitable for adults, couch, bed, and daily home use.
• 60 × 80 inch — Large bed blanket size, ideal for full/queen bed, family use, and extra warmth.
